title: Number Box Swipe
description: Number Box Swipe is a fast-paced puzzle game that challenges players to match and swipe numbered boxes. With minimalist graphics and intuitive controls, players must strategically combine boxes to achieve the target number while navigating obstacles and limited moves. Each level presents increasingly complex puzzles, testing players arithmetic skills and strategic thinking. With endless replayability and a variety of challenges, Number Box Swipe offers addictive gameplay that keeps players hooked , Website Developer https://www.coolcrazygames.com/
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
